query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM processos) AS total_processos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clientes) AS total_clientes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM parceiros) AS total_parceiros,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM logs_consulta) AS total_consultas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM processos WHERE monitoramento_ativo = 1) AS processos_monitorados,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM processos WHERE ultima_atualizacao_api IS NOT NULL) AS processos_atualizados_codilo;
